requirements.task_name: Choose the cheapest web hosting plan with at least 50GB storage under $40/month
requirements.task_description: Filter hosting plans, pick the cheapest qualifying monthly plan (>=50GB, <=$40/mo), and reach checkout summary with exactly that one plan.

required_variables.set_condition: Whenever listHostingPlans is called with filters.min_storage_gb >= 50, filters.billing_cycle === 'monthly' (if provided), and sort_by === 'price_low_to_high'. This records that the user viewed the hosting list with the correct minimum storage and sort order for the task.
required_variables.value_to_set: { "min_storage_gb": filters.min_storage_gb, "billing_cycle": filters.billing_cycle || null, "max_monthly_price": (typeof filters.max_monthly_price === 'number' ? filters.max_monthly_price : null), "sort_by": sort_by || 'price_low_to_high', "set_at": this._nowISO() }
required_variables.reason: Track that the user actually invoked the hosting list with the correct filter/sort criteria (>=50GB storage, monthly billing, sorted by Price: Low to High), not just that they eventually picked a qualifying plan.

required_variables.set_condition: After computing augmentedItems in getCheckoutSummary, if (a) there is exactly one cart item, (b) that item.product_type === 'hosting_plan', (c) item.billing_cycle === 'monthly', (d) item.quantity === 1, (e) the associated hosting plan has storage_gb >= 50 and monthly_price <= 40, and (f) that plan is the cheapest among all active hosting_plans that satisfy storage_gb >= 50 and monthly_price <= 40 (i.e., no other active plan with those constraints has a lower monthly_price). Only then set the variable.
required_variables.value_to_set: { "cart_id": cart.id, "cart_item_id": augmentedItems[0].id, "hosting_plan_id": augmentedItems[0].product_id, "billing_cycle": augmentedItems[0].billing_cycle, "quantity": augmentedItems[0].quantity, "monthly_price": augmentedItems[0].product.monthly_price, "storage_gb": augmentedItems[0].product.storage_gb, "recurring_total": recurring_total, "set_at": this._nowISO() }
required_variables.reason: Provide a single, explicit marker that the user reached the checkout summary page with exactly one hosting plan selected and that this plan is the correct cheapest qualifying plan (>=50GB storage, <=$40/month, monthly billing). This captures both the required navigation step and correctness of the final selection in a non-invasive way.

requirements.task_name: Request a video production quote for a 90-second promo under $8,000
requirements.task_description: Configure and submit a quote request for a 90-second corporate promo video in New York with on-site filming and max budget $8,000.

requirements.task_name: Book the earliest 30-minute online consultation next week between 2–5 PM for website redesign
requirements.task_description: Schedule an online consultation for website redesign next calendar week, choosing the earliest available 30-minute slot between 2:00 PM and 5:00 PM and company size 11–50 employees.

requirements.task_name: Build a digital marketing bundle under $900/month with SEO, social media, and blog content
requirements.task_description: Create a monthly bundle including SEO, social media management, and blog content, with the highest-tier options that keep the total at or below $900/month, then request a proposal.

requirements.task_name: Find a retail case study that uses both IT support and video production and contact sales from it
requirements.task_description: Locate a retail-industry case study involving both IT support and video production, open it, and submit a contact/sales inquiry from that page.

requirements.task_name: Save the most recent cloud backup help article to a reading list
requirements.task_description: Search for cloud backup help content, filter by Cloud Services, sort by most recent, open the most recent cloud backup article, and save it to a reading list (named 'Cloud Topics' if prompted).

requirements.task_name: Submit a high-priority support ticket for an email migration issue
requirements.task_description: As an existing customer, submit a support ticket about an email migration issue in the 'Email & Collaboration' category with high priority and a detailed description.

requirements.task_name: Start a free trial of the most affordable RMM plan for at least 25 devices under $600/month
requirements.task_description: Select the cheapest RMM plan that supports at least 25 devices with monthly price under $600 and start a free trial by completing the signup form.
